description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in a formal military uniform, featuring a dark, buttoned jacket with a high collar, decorated with insignia and a white belt. The figure wears blue trousers with a red stripe down the side, and black formal shoes. A white peaked cap sits atop the head, and the hands are clasped behind the back in a formal, upright posture. The uniform includes visible rank insignia on the sleeves and a medal on the chest, indicating a ceremonial or official role. The face is clean-shaven, and the overall appearance is neat and disciplined, typical of a military personnel in a parade or honor guard. The figure is anatomically proportionate and stands at attention, exuding a sense of order and respect.
description: A formal adult male in a ceremonial military uniform with a white cap, blue trousers, and hands clasped behind the back. The figure stands upright, displaying insignia and medals, typical of a parade or honor guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the figure, highlighting the white cap, high-collared jacket, and the arm insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, the white belt, and the hands clasped behind the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again showing the cap, jacket, and insignia, with the figure's posture clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the full details of the uniform, including buttons, medals, and the formal stance.
attribute_clothing_type: formal military dress uniform with high-collared jacket, trousers, white belt, and peaked cap
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands clasped behind the back
